blended.narrative: Whistler Blackcomb is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,276 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
